SELECT value, left_shift(value, 4) AS shifted_value FROM test_shift WHERE value >= 0;
SELECT value, left_shift(value, 2) AS shifted_value FROM test_shift WHERE value < 0;
CREATE TABLE test_results (original INT, shifted INT);
INSERT INTO test_results (original, shifted) SELECT value, left_shift(value, 2) FROM test_shift;
SELECT t1.value, t2.shifted FROM test_shift t1 JOIN (SELECT value, left_shift(value, 3) AS shifted FROM test_shift) t2 ON t1.value = t2.value WHERE t1.value < 1000;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, multiplier INT);
SELECT a.id, left_shift(b.value, a.multiplier) AS shifted_result FROM test_shift b JOIN additional_data a ON b.value < 1000;
SELECT COUNT(*), left_shift(MAX(value), 5) FROM test_shift GROUP BY left_shift(value, 1);
